aiPrompts.6: Generate a formal and encouraging teacher's remark for a Grade 6 student named {name} who scored {percentage}% ({gradePoint} grade) with {attendance}% attendance. The student's conduct is {conduct}. Keep the remark to 2-3 sentences, professional, and suitable for an official school marksheet. Focus on their academic strengths and areas to improve.
aiPrompts.7: Generate a formal and encouraging teacher's remark for a Grade 7 student named {name} who scored {percentage}% ({gradePoint} grade) with {attendance}% attendance. The student's conduct is {conduct}. Keep the remark to 2-3 sentences, professional, and suitable for an official school marksheet. Mention their readiness for more challenging academic work.
aiPrompts.8: Generate a formal and encouraging teacher's remark for a Grade 8 student named {name} who scored {percentage}% ({gradePoint} grade) with {attendance}% attendance. The student's conduct is {conduct}. Keep the remark to 2-3 sentences, professional, and suitable for an official school marksheet. Focus on preparation for secondary school.

remarksRules.90-100: Outstanding performance! The student has demonstrated exceptional academic excellence and a deep commitment to learning.
remarksRules.80-89: Excellent performance! The student has shown strong dedication and consistent academic achievement.
remarksRules.70-79: Good performance. The student demonstrates a satisfactory understanding of the curriculum with room for further improvement.
remarksRules.60-69: Satisfactory performance. The student should focus on strengthening weak areas and maintaining regular study habits.
remarksRules.below-60: The student needs to put in more effort. Regular practice, timely revision, and seeking help from teachers will lead to improvement.
